title: White Chocolate Stinkbomb
description: A peppery, dense Thai-inspired dish featuring white chocolate chips, braise and whole30-friendly.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add onions and garlic, cook until translucent.
Stir in bell peppers and tomato paste. Sauté for about 5 minutes or until vegetables are slightly soft.
Fold in white chocolate chips and let them melt into the mixture.
If using fish sauce, add it now and stir to combine evenly with other ingredients.
Reduce heat to low, cover pan and simmer for approximately 15-20 minutes until all liquid has evaporated and flavors are melded together.
Serve hot as a side dish or garnish over steamed white rice.
